title: Entity quality (has_entity_name, device_info, rounding)
description: Add _attr_has_entity_name=True to all 5 sensor classes. Remove Monarch prefix from entity names. Preserve unique_ids by computing them explicitly with old formula. Standardize device_info across all classes (fix circular via_device on Income/Expense). Fix round() precision to 2 decimal places. Remove custom available override on CategorySensor.

title: Fix sensor crash bugs (NetWorth, CashFlow, Income, Expense)
description: NetWorthSensor uses direct dict access (account["includeInNetWorth"]) causing KeyError. CashFlowSensor indexes cashflow.get("summary")[0] without empty check causing IndexError. Income/Expense sensors chain .get() calls without None guards causing AttributeError. Fix all 4 sensor _handle_coordinator_update methods with safe .get() defaults and early returns.

title: Config flow fixes (security, reauth, options)
description: Remove password from description_placeholders (security fix). Use async_update_reload_and_abort() for reauth instead of manual update+reload+abort. Change _LOGGER.exception() to _LOGGER.error() for expected login failures. Show current values in options flow via add_suggested_values_to_schema().

title: Trivial fixes (manifest, strings, dead code)
description: manifest.json: change integration_type from device to service, remove quality_scale/homekit/ssdp/zeroconf empty fields. strings.json + translations/en.json: fix typo occured -> occurred. util.py: remove dead snake_case() function and unused re import.

title: Architecture refactoring (const, __init__, coordinator)
description: Move platform forwarding/unloading from coordinator to __init__.py using standard HA patterns. Wire options update listener. Pass config_entry to DataUpdateCoordinator super().__init__(). Remove redundant self._hass/self._config_entry. Replace custom async_setup() with _async_setup() hook. Remove async_reset(). Extract _fetch_api_data() helper to deduplicate API calls. Move PLATFORMS to const.py.

title: f-string logging cleanup
description: Convert all f-string _LOGGER.debug(f"...") calls to lazy _LOGGER.debug("...", arg) format with %s/%d placeholders in sensor.py and update_coordinator.py (~12 occurrences).

title: Bump version in manifest.json
description: Bump version in manifest.json after all fixes are applied. This is the final step before committing.
